zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Mitchell於1511年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親John Mitchell21歲，母親Agnes Tregoz17歲。她於1527年與George Woodward在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1572年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Mitchell于1511年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲John Mitchell21岁，母亲Agnes Tregoz17岁。她于1527年与George Woodward在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1572年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: Mitchell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the vernacular pronunciation in Middle English and Older Scots of the personal name   Michael  . See   Michelson  .
English and Scottish: nickname for a big man, from Middle English michel, mechel, muchel ‘big’.
Irish (County Connacht): surname adopted as equivalent of   Mulvihill  .

variants.name: Michell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Etienne, Yvrose.
English (Cornwall): variant of   Mitchell   and   Michel  .
German: variant of   Michel  . This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mutch
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname for a large (tall or fat) person, from Middle English moche, muche ‘big’ (a shortened form of mochel, muchel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Muckle .

variants.name: Meikle
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Middle Scots mekill, meikill ‘big’. Compare Mitchell 2, Muckle , and Mutch .

variants.name: Mickle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’. Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Mutch .
Americanized form of German   Mickel   1 or of a homonymous Germanized Sorbian surname (see   Mickel   2).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Jewish, and Greek: from the personal name Michael, ultimately from Hebrew Mika’el ‘Who is like God?’. This was borne by an archangel in the Bible, the protector of Israel (Daniel 10:13, 12:1; Rev. 12:7). In Christian tradition, Michael was regarded as the warrior archangel, conqueror of Satan, and the personal name was correspondingly popular throughout Europe, especially in knightly and military families. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Mihály (see Mihaly ), Czech and Slovak Michal , Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Mikhael and Mikhail , and also patronymics and other derivatives from these names, e.g. Greek Papamichael , its cognate Papamichalis, and Michaelides , Serbian Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ), and Slovenian Mihelčič (see Mihelcic ). Compare Mikeal .

variants.name: Mixell
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Mitchell  .

variants.name: Muckle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname for a big man, from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’ (Old English mycel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle and Mutch .
South German: from a diminutive of   Muck   ‘gnat’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Mitchell was born in 1511, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Mitchell, was 21 and her mother, Agnes Tregoz, was 17. She married George Woodward in 1527, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died about 1572, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Mitchell est née en 1511, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mitchell, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Tregoz, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé George Woodward en 1527, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1572, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Mitchell 1511 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mitchell 21 und ihre Mutter Agnes Tregoz 17. Sie hat 1527 in Wiltshire, England George Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 1572 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Mitchell è nata il nel 1511 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Mitchell, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnes Tregoz, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato George Woodward nel 1527, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 1572, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Mitchellが1511年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Mitchellは21歳，母Agnes Tregozは17歳であった。1527年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでGeorge Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1572年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで62歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Mitchell(이)가 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mitchell(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Tregoz(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1527년 영국 윌츠히르에서 George Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Mitchell nasceu em 1511, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mitchell, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Tregoz, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com George Woodward em 1527, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1572, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Mitchell родилась в 1511 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mitchell было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Tregoz, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Woodward в 1527 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 1572 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Mitchell nació en 1511, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mitchell, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes Tregoz, tenía 17 años. Se casó con George Woodward en 1527, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1572, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
